steps.t: Hórin thinks the best course of action is to continue higher into the Welkin-lofts in search of Ausma's apprentices. You should continue south and fin…
Klúso can be found near Bazan-medan. You should talk to Klúso.
Klúso can be found west of Bazan-medan. You should talk to Klúso.
Hórin can be found next to Klúso, west of Bazan-medan. You should talk to Hórin.
